summary: Comprehensive testing of e-commerce automation system completed. Backend APIs work perfectly on localhost, but Kubernetes routing prevents frontend-backend communication via public URL.

critical_bugs.issue: Kubernetes routing returns 404 for all API calls via https://46bd5f3c-2a1b-4fd3-b69d-b6c8bff11fa4.preview.emergentagent.com/api/*
critical_bugs.impact: Frontend cannot communicate with backend - complete integration failure
critical_bugs.working_locally: All endpoints work perfectly on http://localhost:8001/api/*

minor_issues.issue: LLM budget exceeded after testing (Budget: 0.001, Used: 0.02512475)
minor_issues.impact: Content generation fails after budget limit
minor_issues.note: Expected during testing - TikTok and DM generation worked perfectly

integration_issues.issue: Frontend uses public URL but gets 404 errors for all API calls
integration_issues.symptoms: Loading errors, empty product lists, no data display
integration_issues.root_cause: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL points to non-working public endpoint

integration_issues.issue: Default 5 products not auto-initialized due to API communication failure
integration_issues.expected_behavior: Should show 5 default products on first load

passed_tests: TikTok scripts generation with OpenAI GPT-5.2
DM scripts generation with OpenAI GPT-5.2

success_percentage.backend: 90% (all endpoints work locally, routing issue prevents public access)
success_percentage.frontend: 70% (UI works perfectly, API integration fails due to routing)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Kubernetes routing configuration. All backend APIs return 404 via public URL (https://46bd5f3c-2a1b-4fd3-b69d-b6c8bff11fa4.preview.emergentagent.com/api/*) but work perfectly on localhost:8001. Frontend cannot communicate with backend. This is blocking all functionality. Also consider increasing LLM budget for content generation testing.
